title: Create:Veridium Expansion
description: A lightweight expansion adding Veridium alloy, tools, armor, and Easter-egg items inspired by Create & Halo.
body:
Create: Veridium Expansion is a mod that blends Create’s engineering charm with Halo-inspired Veridium gear. Enhance your experience with powerful alloy tools, upgraded armor, and secret Easter eggs — all while preserving Create compatibility without diving into its complex API.

Key Features
Veridium Alloy Creation — craft molten alloy via mixing, fluids, and pressing in a proper Create sequenced assembly chain.

Veridium Armor — notably stronger than Netherite, featuring passive Projectile & Explosion Resistance II when worn as a full set.

Veridium Tools — durable and powerful (sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe) with enhanced attack and efficiency beyond Netherite.

ODST Music Disc — a secret collectible Easter egg that plays a custom Halo-inspired track when inserted in a jukebox.

Mod-Compatible — stays lightweight and fully compatible with Create without the complexity of mixing into Create’s Ponder or API.

Why Use It?
Adds high-tier gear that feels fresh and custom without replacing vanilla assets.

Offers new automatable crafting chains using Create machines — perfect for tech and automation lovers.

Packed with hidden content and lore nods, rewarding players for exploration and creativity.

Support & Community
Have feedback, found a bug, or craving more Veridium gear?

Join our Discord or the GitHub issues tracker to report and discuss.

Want to explore mod internals? Check out the dev docs and version changelogs available in the project files.
